channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Twenty-Nine Nations Unite to Shape the Future of Artificial Intelligence
item.description: Artificial intelligence has become one of the defining technologies of the 21st century. It is transforming industries, reshaping economies, and increasingly influencing national security. Against this backdrop, 29 countries have signed an agreement to establish the World AI Cooperation Organisation (WAICO), a new intergovernmental body aimed at strengthening global cooperation on artificial intelligence governance. Spearheaded [...] The post Twenty-Nine Nations Unite to Shape the Future of Artificial Intelligence appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Kazembe Sends Strong Message Ahead Of Planned July 31 Protests
item.description: Government Says Security Forces Prepared Ahead Of Planned July 31 Protests The Government says security forces are on standby ahead of planned demonstrations scheduled for 31 July 2026, with Home Affairs and Cultural Heritage Minister Kazembe Kazembe saying law enforcement agencies are ready to respond to any unlawful activities. According to ZBC News, Kazembe said [...] The post Kazembe Sends Strong Message Ahead Of Planned July 31 Protests appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Mineral Export Boom Signals Shift Towards Value Addition and Industrial Growth
item.description: HARARE – Zimbabwe’s mineral sector is showing renewed signs of structural transformation, with the latest performance figures from the Minerals Marketing Corporation of Zimbabwe (MMCZ) pointing to growing momentum in the country’s drive to move beyond raw mineral exports and build a value-added mining economy. MMCZ, the government’s statutory mineral marketing agency responsible for all [...] The post Zimbabwe’s Mineral Export Boom Signals Shift Towards Value Addition and Industrial Growth appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Uebert Angel Appears On Video Agreeing With Cde Knox That Auxillia’s About To Be Announced President Of Zimbabwe
item.description: By Dorrothy Moyo | ZimEye | The controversial ‘ambassador’ Uebert Angel. @uebertangel announced in a recent sermon saying the world... Continue reading "Uebert Angel Appears On Video Agreeing With Cde Knox That Auxillia’s About To Be Announced President Of Zimbabwe" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Rebuilding Zimbabwe’s Chemical Industry: The Missing Pillar of Reindustrialisation
item.description: Zimbabwe’s reindustrialisation agenda will not be won by reopening factories or increasing mineral exports alone. The true measure of industrial transformation lies in a country’s ability to produce the intermediate goods that power every sector of the economy. At the heart of this capability is the chemical industry, the invisible backbone of modern manufacturing, agriculture, [...] The post Rebuilding Zimbabwe’s Chemical Industry: The Missing Pillar of Reindustrialisation appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: World Rugby Nations Cup: Zimbabwe name Starting XV vs Canada @3menonaboat
item.description:
The Zimbabwe Sables have named their starting lineup for the final match of the 2026 World Rugby Nations Cup against Canada, with head coach Pieter Benade making several changes to the side following narrow defeats to Tonga and the United States.

The post World Rugby Nations Cup: Zimbabwe name Starting XV vs Canada first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: Zim PSL 2026 Matchday 23 Saturday roundup: CAPS, FC Platinum end winless streak @3menonaboat
item.description:
No draws in Saturday’s action

item.title: Bulawayo Pushes Industrial Renewal to Reclaim Status as Zimbabwe’s Manufacturing Hub
item.description: Sikhulekelani Moyo BULAWAYO Metropolitan Province is intensifying efforts to reclaim its position as Zimbabwe’s industrial heartland, with government and Parliament aligning on infrastructure development, investment promotion and institutional oversight... (via H-metro) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: H-metro

item.title: Mukosho Village Disaster: Shock as 14-year-old boy kills his best friend over US$2... ‘Ndakapihwa mangoromera nababa vangu’
item.description: Mukosho Village Disaster: Shock as 14-year-old boy kills his best friend over US$2 MUKOSHO VILLAGE, MARANGE – A profound sense of sorrow has enveloped Mushunje High School and the wider Marange community following a tragic incident where a dispute over a mere US$2 allegedly escalated into the death of a Form One learner. This devastating [...] The post Mukosho Village Disaster: Shock as 14-year-old boy kills his best friend over US$2... ‘Ndakapihwa mangoromera nababa vangu’ first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News
